title: Crepidomanes maximum
taxonomy: Crepidomanes maximum belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. This family of plants is commonly known as the filmy ferns. Crepidomanes maximum is a species of epiphytic fern, which means it grows on other plants such as trees and shrubs. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Oceania. Crepidomanes maximum is classified under the kingdom Plantae and is a member of the division Pteridophyta.
